# Simpatico Roofing & Consulting

> Residential and commercial roofing contractor in Grand Rapids, Michigan. Founded 2020. Atlas Pro Gold certified. Michigan Saves Authorized Contractor #204229. 5.0 star rating across 90 Google reviews.

## Contact

- Address: 3113 Hillcroft Ave SW, Grand Rapids, MI 49548
- Phone: 616.287.4001
- Email: info@simpaticoroofing.com
- Hours: Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 4:00 PM Eastern
- Book a free assessment: https://book.simpaticoroofing.com

## Service area

Grand Rapids, Kentwood, Wyoming, Walker, Rockford, Ada, Cascade, Caledonia, Forest Hills, East Grand Rapids, Comstock Park, Lowell, and the rest of Kent County, Michigan.

## Services

- Roof Replacement: Full tear-off and install with premium materials.
- Shingle Repairs & Maintenance: Small leaks to full restoration.
- Flat Roof Repair & Maintenance: Low-slope and commercial systems.
- Ventilation Installation: Proper attic airflow to extend roof life.
- Gutters & Flashing: Complete water management.
- Roofing Consulting: Guidance for builders and property managers.

## How we work

1. Book a free, no-obligation assessment online or by phone.
2. Receive a clear written estimate in plain language with no hidden fees.
3. We manage permits, installation, and cleanup, keeping you informed throughout.
4. You don't pay until you tell us we've exceeded your expectations.

## Products installed

- Atlas Shingles with 3M Scotchgard
- Air Vent ventilation systems
- Robert's Roof Caps

## Financing partners

- Medallion Bank (home improvement loans)
- Lake Michigan Credit Union (home equity and personal loans)
- Michigan Saves (commercial and energy-efficient improvements)
